title: v6.9 frontier: executable work readiness gate
description: Implement work-readiness-record and work-readiness-audit so AOF can block implementation readiness when goal, risk, loss boundary, acceptance gates, evidence plan, maker/checker separation, or stop conditions are missing.
triage_notes: Completed v6.9 implementation: added work-readiness schemas, record/audit commands, release-state integration, CLI docs, tests, and committed readiness evidence.
